posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
When AI steps into the boardroom, what does leadership look like?
You’re about to find out.
Introducing Leadership Meets AI - the very first event in our new monday lounge series.

We’re bringing together sharp minds and even sharper questions to explore how leadership is evolving when AI isn’t just a tool, it’s a teammate.

This isn’t a “sit back and listen” kind of hour.
It’s a show up*, get inspired, and walk away *thinking differently kind of hour.
If you’re a decision-maker, a team builder, or just someone who leads with curiosity - this is for you.

It’s happening live. It’s happening soon.
And yes - we saved you a seat.
Reserve your spot

posts.author: Phexonn (Phexonn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yuval Apeloig :

b

What helped us was starting small—using AI first to summarize meeting notes and draft emails. It saved us time and gave leaders quick overviews without digging through everything.

posts.author: Phexonn (Phexonn)
posts.cookedHtml: Events like this feel super relevant right now—AI is not just a tool but an active part of decision-making. Watched a team try to blend AI suggestions with human intuition, and it was eye-opening how leadership had to adapt on the fly. Sites like https://openeverything.us/ dive deep into these shifts, showing how ethics and innovation collide in real-world scenarios.
